pairs.left: They killed the dragon in cold blood.
pairs.right: in a cruel, unfeeling, violent way

pairs.left: Trying to get information from him is like getting blood out of a stone!

pairs.right: family relationships are the most important

pairs.left: He sweated blood to set up the company.
Cruelty to animals makes my blood boil.
